subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Your letter was received and its contents brought joy, for they testified of your turning toward God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله نامه شما رسید مضمون سبب سرور گردید زیرا دلیل بر آن بود که توجه بخدا
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @universality of the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @unity; oneness of humanity, @consolation and comfort, @harmony of science and religion
